news.paragraph: Walmart is seeing positive analyst sentiment following a price target upgrade from Bernstein, which raised its target to $145 and maintained an outperform rating. The company is also pursuing store differentiation through the expansion of its wellness partnerships. While some discussions have emerged regarding its valuation, the recent analyst activity provides a constructive backdrop for the stock.
headlines: Bernstein Adjusts Price Target on Walmart to $145 From $134, Maintains Outperform Rating
Walmart Expands Wellness Partners To Support Loyalty And Store Differentiation
Walmart (WMT) Stock Sinks As Market Gains: Here's Why
Is Walmart (WMT) Overvalued After Strong Long Term Returns And Recent Steady Share Price Gains
